title: Process for the review of the concentration limit for medium-chain chlorinated paraffins pursuant to paragraph 2 of part XIII of Annex A to the Stockholm Convention, and of the specific exemptions for medium-chain chlorinated paraffins pursuant to paragraph 12 of part XIII of Annex A
meeting_title: 21st meeting of the Persistent Organic Pollutants Review Committee of the Stockholm Convention (POPRC-21)
